name: novel-swarm
description: MiroFish-style swarm intelligence engine for novel writing

scripts.setup:backend:unix: cd backend && (python3.11 -m venv .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -e .
scripts.setup:backend:win: cd backend && (py -3.11 -m venv .venv || python -m venv .venv) && .venv\Scripts\pip install -e .
scripts.setup:all:unix: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend:unix
scripts.setup:all:win: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend:win
scripts.dev:unix: npx concurrently "npm run backend:unix" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev:win: npx concurrently "npm run backend:win" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run backend:win" "npm run frontend"
